violations.description: Food supplies. — --Food item obtained from unapproved source. Mr. Hens pickled eggs and raw eggs not an approved source.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Store food items off floors in walk in cooler and walk in freezer.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. Drawer cooler not maintained at proper temperature. Items temping at 41-43 degrees F..

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Cardboard used as shelving liner in walk in cooler.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Remove moldy cardboard shelving liner in walk in cooler. Reach in cooler, microwave, reach in freezer, alto sham, & line equipment need cleaning.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. General cleaning needed. Shelving units, lower counter storage shelving, equipment, etc..

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Food service clam shells stored next to refuse can in kitchen. Clam shells stored on floor in small storage area next to cook line.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors walls ceilings not maintained clean.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Close wall near cook line where insulation is exposed.

General premises. — --Opening to outside or portion of building that is not part of the food establishment, was not protected against the entry of insects and rodents. West and North customer entry and delivery doors not provided with self closing mechanisms.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Proper storage, no-reuse (1 pt deducted)
Installed, maintained (1 pt deducted)
